name: Chicken in Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large frying pan, melt margarine over medium heat.
3. Add shallots and garlic and cook until tender but not brown, about 2 minutes.
4. Stir in chicken, parsley, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Separate crescent rolls into 4 squares; seal the line in each square.
6. Divide chicken mixture equally among squares; fold to make a triangle and seal edges.
7. Prick tops of pastry with fork and brush with egg substitute.
8. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet for 15 minutes, until golden brown.
9. Remove to a serving platter and keep warm until ready to serve.
